THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/28/09 IS CONTINUED TO 10/5/09 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:00 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 9/24/09 IS CONTINUED TO 10/1/09 IN DEPT. 218 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT WITHHOLDS ANY DECISION ON 1170.5(A). MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND GIVE NOTICE AND SERVE THE ORDER ON MR. BORNSTEIN'S OFFICE NO LATER THAN 9/24/09. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: DIANA CHEN, CSR #11312 (206)

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Andrew Westley; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Stephen Seaver is present.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Torgeir Hansson, (sued as Torgier Hansson), is present.
Attorney, Tyler Macmillan representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle, the trial date of OCT-05-2009 remains set.
